criteria.description: Provider package release contract documents package name, version line, dependency shape, install shape, and unpublished status.
criteria.notes: README and release docs state purple-php/provider-bedrock, intended 0.1.x line, future composer require command, and not-yet-published Packagist status.

criteria.description: Package-local release notes cover first release and migration from root Sdk::bedrock().
criteria.notes: Changelog records 0.1.0 - Unreleased, first-release scope, and migration to Purple\Provider\Bedrock\BedrockSdk::create().

criteria.description: CI validates root SDK and Bedrock provider package separately.
criteria.notes: Workflow has separate root-sdk and provider-bedrock jobs; command grep found composer check and package working-dir commands.

criteria.description: Default validation preserves no-AWS, no-live-service, no-sidecar, and no-native baseline.
criteria.notes: CI does not configure secrets or publish steps; docs state default validation requires no AWS credentials, live calls, SDK dependency, sidecar service, or native extension.

criteria.description: Packagist publication checklist and release sequence are documented for later use.
criteria.notes: Release doc includes release sequence, Packagist checklist, validation commands, and rollback notes without publishing.

criteria.description: Roadmap and architecture docs represent release readiness as packaging-track completion after Phase 5.2.
criteria.notes: Docs add Phase 5.3 release-readiness language and keep next optional provider split as a later candidate.

criteria.description: Mission records evidence for docs, CI, and Composer validation.
criteria.notes: Acceptance and issue matrices capture evidence; final WP verification runs root and provider package Composer checks.
